message:
fix(harness): remove redundant #[must_use] on BoxedStrategy returns

BoxedStrategy already has #[must_use], so the attribute on the arb_*
strategy builder functions triggers clippy::double_must_use. Removing
them makes the full workspace pass `clippy --workspace -- -D warnings`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
